title: HAVING unable to filter on aggregates
description:
select ?s (count(?o) as ?count) where {

    ?s ?p ?o

} group by ?s having (?count > 3)

Fails unexpectedly with
Virtuoso 37000 Error SP031: SPARQL compiler: Variable ?count is used in the result set outside aggregate and not mentioned in GROUP BY clause


Fine without HAVING clause
Fine with Sesame 2.7 / Fuseki 1.1
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, COUNT(value) AS count_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count_value > 2;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
key_bug_features: HAVING clause fails with aggregate variable outside GROUP BY
